title: Tests, Examples, Fuzzing, Benchmarks, Coverage, and Static Analysis · Execution Trace: Benchmarks Coverage
summary: A parser passes familiar examples but fails malformed UTF-8, aliases caller memory, and regresses under a dependency update. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go benchmarks coverage increment in a layered parser quality dossier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design benchmarks with controlled work and allocations, compare statistically, and interpret coverage as location evidence rather than quality.
Define fuzz properties, seed corpora, bounds, failure minimization, and retained regression inputs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Declare types, ownership, goroutine lifetime, failure contract, and observable result; trace value copies, aliases, blocking, and happens-before edges; run the smallest isolated program; then change one boundary input and retain a regression invariant. Apply that move specifically to Benchmarks Coverage while producing a layered parser quality dossier.
